name: Summit Funnel
origin: Host a free online summit featuring multiple expert speakers/interviews. Builds authority and a large subscriber list simultaneously; the upsell is typically the paid all-access recordings bundle.

whenToUse.summary: Use to build a large list and authority fast by hosting a free multi-speaker online event, monetized by a paid all-access recordings bundle (and speaker cross-promotion traffic).
goals: Build a large subscriber list quickly via speaker cross-promotion
Establish the host's authority by association with multiple experts
Monetize free registrants with a paid all-access / recordings upsell
signals: Client wants rapid list growth and authority
Has or can recruit multiple expert speakers who will promote
Topic supports 10-30+ sessions over multiple days
Wants a low-friction free front end + paid upsell
antiSignals: Needs immediate high-ticket sale, not list-building

pageStructure.purpose: Sell the free registration with a big promise and the speaker lineup.
keyElements: Speaker lineup showcase (photos, names, session topics)

pageStructure.purpose: Confirm registration and immediately pitch the paid all-access recordings bundle.
keyElements: All-Access Pass pitch (lifetime recordings, bonuses, transcripts)
Upgrade urgency (price rises after the summit / fast-action bonus)

pageStructure.purpose: Deliver each day's speaker sessions (free for a limited window).
keyElements: Session video embeds per speaker / per day
All-access upsell reminder beside the player

pageStructure.purpose: Deliver the paid bundle to upgraders.

scripts: Registration page positioning = StoryBrand SB7 (attendee = hero, host = guide, the summit = the plan to win)
Headline + speaker fascinations + opt-in bullets = Copywriting Secrets
Host welcome / session intros = Epiphany Bridge
copyFramework.notes: Clarity wins on a free multi-speaker event — SB7 keeps the promise simple. Speakers each promote, so the registration page must convert their cold-ish traffic fast.

automations: Register → daily 'session is live' email/SMS sequence
Affiliate/speaker attribution tags for cross-promo crediting
All-access purchase → grant membership + exit upsell sequence
Post-summit → expiring all-access offer to free registrants
ghlBuild.notes: Skill 6 builds the registration, confirmation/upsell, and daily session pages plus the member area; Skill 44 generates the opt-in form, the all-access order form + bump, speaker/schedule blocks, and the countdown/price-rise timers.
